problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: If Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus is applied to alone, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
